testcase.name: test_chat_translation_to_arabic

failure.message:
AssertionError: Translation failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_features.py:64: in test_chat_translation_to_arabic assert response.status_code == 200, f"Translation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Translation failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
